Felhammer  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 46
DMG: 34 Dmg Bonus: 158
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Smite (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

very nice
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2002 at 9:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778968876
73 posts
Bought mine for 500pp and the sword hasn't left my hands since. I know there's better, but for those of us with out massive Plat flows from whatever means, I'm happy with what I've got
▲ Page top
Felhammer
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 3:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759766584
1 post
Banorff lvl 40
im selling 1 of these on fenin ro server,2.5k obo
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 08 2002 at 11:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This is a very nice weapon to have if your between lvl's 30-50. Also should be even nicer if you have a fbss or another haste item. Most warriors who dual wield in between those levels either have a centi ls/lammy combo, wurmy/lamy, or centi ls/wurmy. As you know, wurmys can only go in primary slot, wich I think is a bad idea. Warriors need fast and fruios in primary. A wurmy is slow and fruios, but if you can still taunt off other tanks with it, then go for it. As for taunting while wielding this weapon, I had no problems what soever, specially when it started to proc wich was at lvl 50 Or 51, I forget, Proc does about 83dd to target, sometimes less depending on the mobs resistance. And yes I have wielded a wurmy once, was pretty nice but I still perfer fast weapons, and procing weapons. I still have this Felhammer and planning to sell it once I get my epic :)
Pretty nice IMO
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 7:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255502360
7 posts
Hmm got this a few days ago for a fair price. bought it for 900plat and did /bazaar and saw 2 others 1 for 4900 and the other for 7000 thought I did pretty good >;) I love this thing being a lvl 37 halfling warr twinked I gusse.. well now days there hardly is any "twink"but any way I fight in Dread Lands <soloing at this level is pretty god damn hard> Average hit with 189str 100-120 and with a ench haste its not that bad of dly just wish it would proc Highest cripling with it was 300 somthing and highest crit was 201. So Id say this is semi better then duel weilding it really depends on your STR-Lvl IMO at least but hey you never know when you want to duel wield so I keep both up via keeping my frosty and lammy in a bag after all we are wars not monks we can carry that extra crap =D

muahaha

91 posts
just got one of these puppies for a BD. WAY worth it.

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 03 2002 at 6:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hey i was looking for one of these if you could hook me up im on CAZIC names pariath or oopas
A nice sword
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 6:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769911301
10 posts
I bought one of these for 2k on Zeb, it has nie stats and with my swistclaw sash 18% haste, it drops the delay down to 37.72 with a dmg stat of 34 thats pretty cool, although for the dd proc I think the procing level should be nearer 40, or be a better DD.

I'll probably keep this until I can aford an Argent Protector or similar.

pretty sweet
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2001 at 1:30 AM Rating: Default
Baadan
61 posts
im lvl 36, jsut got it tonight in NFP - worked on zigg flin with it - dbl atked for 105 and 92 - 197dmg at one tme, that pretty sweet, doens tproc yet, and wont for a while but the dmg is nice, hella slow though... i think i still prefer my CSS and lammy, or maybe my stormwood battle staff, but this is still sweet


http://www.knightsofthemyst.com

Baadan - 75 Warrior
Saryrn
▲ Page top
RE: pretty sweet
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 2:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775908882
View User Forum
Scholar
18 posts
It is a sweet sword. At 46, I can double for 240 points (total). My 2hs is capped for pre 50, so it'll get even better. My highest crit is about 240 (single hit). I've seen a crippling blow land for 267. My buffed strength is near 200.

With Sash of the Dragonborn and an enchanter quick, I can get agro off a DW'ing warrior in just a few rounds.

Hitting fast is cool, but nothing beats the thump of a BFS.

▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 12:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247376387
View User Forum
7 posts
Anyone know why it is lore ?
▲ Page top
RE: Lore Status
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 10:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761912254
135 posts
Ummm...my guess would be it is Lore so that people who can't use them or who already have them can't simply farm them like mad and corner the market...but that should be a given.
▲ Page top
not that great for warrior
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2001 at 6:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768768124
26 posts
well this sword says its worth a lot eh, but if your a warr you should duel wield with a wurmslayer you get awsome dmg and its a 1hs me myself i use to lamentations ans hit fast they are much better for a warrior but it is pretty easy to sell one of these slow 2hs..sell for low but when puttin it in a trade hehe its usefull
▲ Page top
RE: not that great for warrior
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2003 at 3:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1632097023438
View User Forum
130 posts
just to let you know..warriors ARE NOT a DPS class so wurmys on a warrior ARE HORRIBLE warriors are for agro and taking dmg not for doing dmg...
▲ Page top
RE: not that great for warrior
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2001 at 12:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
Au contrair!

I have an IKS/WAR friend who uses one of these. He made it to 34 soloing giants in WW. When I group with him (I dual with ws in primary) I can't pull things from him without taunt and his average damage over time is much higher than mine.

2HS used to not be so useful. Now, I think warriors have to seriously consider going that way. Of course, it's an easy choice when the warrior epic is (sometimes) a 2HS and the best warrior weap in the game (Palladius Axe of Slaughter) is 2HS.... Felhammer is a very nice place to start, and with it selling so cheap on most servers, I think it's better value than Wurmy.

▲ Page top
RE: not that great for warrior
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2002 at 11:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776167319
43 posts
i agree completely, if you find a really uber 2hs out there, use it when you hit for the most, although i use a defiance and frostbringer (only had em for a couple days while playing) along with my FBSS, the delay on defiance went from 19 to 15, and frosty for 22 to 18, keeled Lily Ashwood in FayMart and dropped her mush faster than usual, ok the point being 2hs can be uber, if you practice and you do a lot of damage, if i get the cash i'm gonna try to buy one of these.....or some other 2hs
▲ Page top
RE: not that great for warrior

# Mar 07 2002 at 4:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771236046

Actually, the BEST warrior weapon in the game is the twisted steel ******* sword. Palladius' Axe of Slaughter is arguably one of the best plate class hybrid weapons in the game. Just wanted to clarify.

▲ Page top
by no means useless
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 4:53 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
in the hands of a warrior with 200str, a FBSS, a haste spell, and a boon people can not get things offa me no matter what they do. on an average lvl 50 mob with a 6 person group i will do between 3000 and 4000 points of damage... not bad for a "slow POS". Granted a couple nice 1hs with the haste and boon is nice too.... but i get double attacks very frequently for 160 each and i get 5 or 6 procs each fight.

doesn't proc at 45
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 4:49 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
At 48 it does not proc... so the guy who said it procs at 45 either has an old one or was a bit off on his counting.

Use for trade...
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2001 at 12:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752558215
83 posts
I don't really know who would actually buy this sword, but it's a great trade item. Even though EQprices has it listed at 26k, that's pretty off i'ld guess. I traded this and a cane of the tranquil for a bloodfire, and I'm very happy with the bloodfire and he's very happy with the Felhammer and Cane. It's not too rare a drop from teh Illis Wiz in Disco camp in seb. It says Knight up there, but a Illis wiz had the one I won the roll for. Anyways, good luck if you wanna get this, disco is camp in seb, 50+ just so ya know.


-Renovan, 51 Warrior of Xev

that angelwind guy is an ******* :P
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 23 2001 at 6:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Angelwind you are a gimp, that must be the worst trade in history, i hope i can find a moron like you to trade a fellhammer to
This weapon Owns
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Got this off a frog on the way down to a Jug raid in Sebilis. I was using a jasarth trident Primary and Silken whip for seconday. They sit in the bank now... People think you cant tuant with slow 2hs'ers well your dead wrong. I can keep things taunted on myself the whole fight with other tanks 3-4 levels higher than me in the group dual wielding Lammys. Average hit with this and my 188 str is right about 100 i would say. I see 120-140 alot. Normal high hit for me so far is 164 and crits are 170 + on average and 200+ about 1 in 10 . In an average fight against 50+ Mobs with my 103 dex I see about 3 procs per fight. I have seen as many as 6-8 procs in a fight this thing procs alot but more than 3 in one fight doesnt happen often. The proc is a 83 damage dd and it really pisses off mobs.

Deicidal Dyerwrath
53 Warrior
Celestial rage
▲ Page top
The Felhammer
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2001 at 6:43 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ok, The Felhammer is the weapon i use, and no matter how much my group yells at me for useing it, they all seem to shut up after i use it for about 10 min.

The proc starts at level 50<<<yes 50! its a pain in the *** but hey! that just means in 2 levels it is gonna kick even more ***.

It drops off of some monster deep in seb. I got mine from what i consider a lucky trade, 13k and a Jarsath Trident.

the taunting issue? 9 out of 10 times i can keep the monster on my just fine with a 2h.

48th Holy Warrior of Marr
Terses Truestorm
Tarew Marr
Half Elf
